how to make the gap year meaningful

expressions.example: From my perspective, taking a gap year can help students gain clarity about their goals.
Remote work offers flexibility. That being said, it can also blur the boundary between work and life.
I see your point, but I believe face-to-face interaction is still irreplaceable.
A case in point is the rise of short-video platforms among young learners.
It goes without saying that mental health is just as important as physical health.

expressions.en: What I'm trying to say is ...
expressions.example: What I'm trying to say is that balance is more important than perfection.

expressions.en: On the one hand ... on the other hand ...
expressions.example: On the one hand, AI saves time; on the other hand, it may reduce critical thinking.
To put it another way, financial literacy is a survival skill in modern society.
I'm convinced that small daily habits lead to significant long-term changes.
The way I see it, exploring different fields early in college reduces future regret.
There's no denying that social media has reshaped how we build relationships.
It reminds me of my own experience of learning to manage my budget.

shadowing.title: The Value of Reading
shadowing.text: Reading is one of the most powerful habits a person can develop. It expands our vocabulary, improves our concentration, and exposes us to ideas we might never encounter in daily life. Even twenty minutes of reading a day can make a noticeable difference over time.
shadowing.audioHint: 注意连读：'reading is'、'ideas we'、'difference over'。

shadowing.title: Dealing with Failure
shadowing.text: Failure is not the opposite of success; it is part of success. Every setback teaches us something valuable if we are willing to reflect. The key is not to avoid failure, but to respond to it with patience and a willingness to grow.
shadowing.audioHint: 注意弱读：'is not'、'of success'、'to reflect'。

shadowing.title: The Importance of Sleep
shadowing.text: Many college students sacrifice sleep to finish assignments or prepare for exams. However, research shows that adequate sleep improves memory, creativity, and decision-making. Pulling an all-nighter may feel productive, but it often backfires the next day.

shadowing.title: Learning a New Language
shadowing.text: Learning a new language opens doors to different cultures and ways of thinking. It requires consistency rather than talent. Making mistakes is a natural part of the process, and fluent speakers are often those who practice despite feeling embarrassed.
shadowing.audioHint: 注意语调：列举时升调，句末降调。

shadowing.title: Sustainable Living
shadowing.text: Sustainable living does not mean giving up comfort. It means making conscious choices, such as reducing waste, reusing items, and choosing public transport. Small actions, when multiplied by millions of people, can have a global impact.
shadowing.audioHint: 注意停顿：在'such as'前后稍作停顿。
